repairs.reason: non-standard tolerance arg names `abstol`/`reltol` (BNG2.pl ignores them -> default tol); canonical atol/rtol so the intended setting is honored
`atoll=>` is a typo for `atol=>` (BNG2.pl ignores it -> default tol)

stray `par_scan_vals=>[...]` left on the explicit `simulate` (belongs to `parameter_scan`); BNG2.pl ignored it but PyBioNetGen's bngmodel parser rejects it, silently routing the job off bngsim to legacy BNG2.pl — dropped to match the single-simulate intent (behavior identical to what BNG2.pl already ran)
6 setConcentration() species patterns drop the closing paren (modeler typo): IGF1(ds,hs,label~cold" -> IGF1(ds,hs,label~cold)"
`atoll=>` is a typo for `atol=>` (BNG2.pl ignores it -> default tol)
